---
title: "Get Data on Languages Spoken in the US"
author: Catherine Brockway, PhD; UN CIFAL Honolulu; catherine.lee.brockway@gmail.com;Epifania Petelo
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_download: TRUE
    theme: sandstone
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float: TRUE
    code_folding: hide
---

This project seeks to make data about languages spoken in the US accessible to decision-makers in social sector enterprises. 

```{r env setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(kableExtra)
library(tigris)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
#set your census api key using instructions at https://walker-data.com/tidycensus/reference/census_api_key.html
Sys.getenv("CENSUS_API_KEY")
```

```{r get data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_pums <- get_pums(
  variables = c("LANP", "AGEP", "ENG"),
  state = "all",
  survey = "acs5",
  year = 2021,
  recode = TRUE
)

summary(lang_pums)
```

```{r}
totals <- lang_pums %>%
  count(LANP_label, wt = PWGTP)%>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```

```{r reactable US languages}
reactable(
totals,
searchable = TRUE,
showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
striped = TRUE,
highlight = TRUE,
columns = list(
LANP_label = colDef(name = "Language"),
n = colDef(name = "Number of Speakers")
)
)
```

```{r remove english data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_nonEng <- lang_pums %>%
  filter(LANP != "000N")%>%
  select(PWGTP, AGEP, ST_label, ENG_label, LANP_label)
write.csv(lang_nonEng, "NonEnglishLanguages2022.csv")

```


```{r get hawaii data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_puma_hawaii <- get_pums(
  variables = c("PUMA", "LANP", "AGEP", "ENG"),
  state = "HI",
  survey = "acs5",
  year = 2021,
  recode = TRUE
)

summary(lang_puma_hawaii$PUMA)
```

```{r}
totals_HI_puma <- lang_puma_hawaii %>%
  count(PUMA, LANP_label, wt = PWGTP)%>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```

```{r subset HI data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_nonEng_HI <- lang_puma_hawaii %>%
  filter(LANP != "000N")%>%
  select(PWGTP, AGEP, PUMA, ENG_label, LANP_label)
write.csv(lang_nonEng_HI, "NonEnglishLanguagesHI.csv")

```

```{r}
hi_pumas <- map("HI", tigris::pumas, class = "sf", cb = TRUE, year = 2020) %>% 
  reduce(rbind)
```

```{r}
hi_map <- lang_puma_hawaii %>%
  group_by(PUMA) %>%
  summarize(
    total_pop = sum(PWGTP),
    pct_non_eng = sum(PWGTP[LANP != "000N"]) / total_pop
  )
```

```{r}

# zoom map: https://www.r-bloggers.com/2019/04/zooming-in-on-maps-with-sf-and-ggplot2/

hi_pumas %>%
  left_join(hi_map, by = c('PUMACE20' = 'PUMA')) %>%
  ggplot(aes(fill = pct_non_eng)) +
  geom_sf() +
  scale_fill_viridis_b(
    name = NULL,
    option = "magma",
    labels = scales::label_percent(1)
    ) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-153, -160), ylim = c(18.5, 23), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Percentage of population speaking a language other than English at home") +
   #geom_sf_text_repel(aes(label = PUMACE20)) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    #data = PUMACE20,
    aes(label = NAMELSAD20, geometry = geometry),
    stat = "sf_coordinates",
    min.segment.length = 0,
    colour = "darkgray",
    max.overlaps = 20
  )+
  theme_void()
```


```{r get texas data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_puma_texas <- get_pums(
  variables = c("PUMA", "LANP", "AGEP", "ENG"),
  state = "TX",
  survey = "acs5",
  year = 2021,
  recode = TRUE
)

summary(lang_puma_texas$PUMA)
```

```{r}
totals_TX_puma <- lang_puma_texas %>%
  count(PUMA, LANP_label, wt = PWGTP)%>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```

```{r subset TX data, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lang_nonEng_TX <- lang_puma_texas %>%
  filter(LANP != "000N")%>%
  select(PWGTP, AGEP, PUMA, ENG_label, LANP_label)
write.csv(lang_nonEng_TX, "NonEnglishLanguagesTX.csv")

```

```{r}
tx_pumas <- map("TX", tigris::pumas, class = "sf", cb = TRUE, year = 2020) %>% 
  reduce(rbind)
```

```{r}
tx_map <- lang_puma_texas %>%
  group_by(PUMA) %>%
  summarize(
    total_pop = sum(PWGTP),
    pct_in_pov = sum(PWGTP[LANP != "000N"]) / total_pop
  )
```

```{r}
tx_pumas %>%
  left_join(tx_map, by = c('PUMACE20' = 'PUMA')) %>%
  ggplot(aes(fill = pct_in_pov)) +
  geom_sf() +
  scale_fill_viridis_b(
    name = NULL,
    option = "magma",
    labels = scales::label_percent(1)
    ) +
  #coord_sf(xlim = c(-153, -160), ylim = c(18.5, 23), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Percentage of population speaking a language other than English at home") +
   #geom_sf_text_repel(aes(label = PUMACE20)) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    #data = PUMACE20,
    aes(label = PUMACE20, geometry = geometry),
    stat = "sf_coordinates",
    min.segment.length = 0,
    colour = "darkgray",
    max.overlaps = 20
  )+
  theme_void()
```
